steps.title: Substitute directly
steps.content: The question gives $x=40$ and asks for $x+6$. Replace $x$ with $40$: $$x+6=40+6.$$

steps.title: Compute and compare
steps.content: $40+6=46$, so the target value is $46$. An incorrect response subtracts $6$, an incorrect response stops at $x$, and an incorrect response adds the wrong amount. C is correct.
